skills.name: First Aid / Medical
skills.description: Basic medical training, wound care, CPR certified

skills.name: Boat Operation
skills.description: Licensed or experienced in operating rescue boats

skills.name: Strong Swimmer
skills.description: Confident swimmer capable of rescue operations

skills.name: Heavy Vehicle Driving
skills.description: Licensed to drive trucks, buses, or ambulances

skills.name: Mass Cooking
skills.description: Experience preparing food for large groups

skills.name: Construction / Repair
skills.description: Carpentry, masonry, or structural repair skills

skills.name: HAM Radio / Communication
skills.description: Licensed HAM radio operator or communication specialist

medical_evac.name: Medical Evacuation
medical_evac.description: Transport critically ill/injured to medical facilities

supply_delivery_road.name: Road Supply Delivery
supply_delivery_road.description: Deliver food, water, medicine via road

supply_delivery_water.name: Water Supply Delivery
supply_delivery_water.description: Deliver supplies to areas cut off by flooding

shelter_feeding.name: Shelter Feeding
shelter_feeding.description: Prepare and serve food at relief shelters

shelter_medical.name: Shelter Medical
shelter_medical.description: Provide medical care at relief shelters

search_rescue.name: Search & Rescue
search_rescue.description: Search for missing persons in affected areas

road_clearing.name: Road Clearing
road_clearing.description: Clear debris and restore road access

communication.name: Communication Setup
communication.description: Establish communication networks in cut-off areas

metadata.source: Derived from Kerala SDMA volunteer registry patterns and 2018 flood volunteer profiles
metadata.notes: Skill frequencies represent approximate distribution in NGO volunteer pools in Kerala
